headline: How The Investment Story For Air Products And Chemicals (APD) Is Shifting With New Analyst Views
summary: Analysts have recently lifted price targets on Air Products and Chemicals into the US$325 to US$330 range, while the modelled fair value in this update is unchanged at US$327.86. These moves are tied to a more constructive tone around pricing power in certain chemical chains, easing helium supply concerns and a slightly more supportive setup for sentiment over the nearer term. In the following sections, you will see how this updated narrative fits together and what to watch as new information...

headline: IP Expands Capabilities in West Coast Region With NORPAC Acquisition
summary: International Paper expands its West Coast footprint with the $360M NORPAC acquisition, adding containerboard capacity and boosting packaging capabilities.
